title: Meituan LongCat 2.0 (Tested): China's 1.6T OPEN MODEL looks CRAZY!
summary: Meituan released LongCat-2.0, a 1.6 trillion parameter Mixture-of-Experts model designed for long-context, coding, research, and agentic tasks. The model activates approximately 48 billion parameters per token and was trained on AI ASIC superpods rather than Nvidia GPUs.
writeup: The video covers Meituan's release of LongCat-2.0, a 1.6 trillion parameter Mixture-of-Experts model aimed at long-context, coding, research, and agentic workloads, and puts it through hands-on testing. It matters because the model activates only about 48 billion parameters per token, keeping inference sparse despite the large total size, and because it was trained on AI ASIC superpods instead of Nvidia GPUs. Key takeaways: the open release sits at the 1.6T scale with MoE routing and sparse attention, and the training-hardware choice signals a path around Nvidia for large-scale model development in China.
